return(function(...)local x={"\115\075\119\082\085\055\061\061","\071\075\090\099\097\054\070\048\114\043\066\084\097\055\061\061","\115\075\119\078\071\075\050\061";"\073\075\119\121\114\075\073\108\089\081\101\066\115\075\073\110\115\075\073\052\089\117\061\061";"\050\043\120\100\112\050\090\080\115\052\070\101\117\110\083\110","\117\052\070\117\106\122\066\084","\076\051\090\080\097\122\069\061";"\072\078\087\066\097\098\120\057\072\087\061\061";"","\071\122\066\084\076\100\115\066\071\087\061\061","\071\122\066\084\114\043\119\108\085\076\101\047\076\104\070\099\085\122\065\086\114\087\061\061";"\071\113\081\061";"\089\071\119\070\079\080\097\065\082\089\080\061";"\097\104\101\065\116\048\097\051\050\043\119\106\109\051\099\079";"\067\115\052\088\086\081\121\075\089\076\087\107\057\110\088\082\100\090\109\061";"\072\087\061\061";"\071\122\066\084\114\043\119\108\085\076\101\047","\071\051\066\076\101\054\102\061","\097\075\066\082\109\100\090\108\097\119\090\057\097\118\061\061","\116\054\101\048\114\081\115\066\115\118\061\061","\122\119\089\061","\071\122\066\084\076\104\079\099\114\118\061\061","\081\099\070\118\115\074\076\071\089\081\121\071\120\100\053\089\084\087\113\100\047\049\117\107";"\116\082\119\100\122\075\070\073\114\113\081\047\116\048\090\048\097\048\120\061","\097\076\079\108\071\104\089\061","\114\104\101\108\085\122\047\056";"\087\100\054\107\054\103\112\054\074\087\048\099\119\051\120\110\116\043\069\100\108\104\073\081\111\076\103\051\072\054\086\115\080\068\098\051\104\112\057\121\106\079\052\053\085\053\070\101\050\057\090\049\074\069\050\087\102\066\056\078\113\047\109\061","\106\066\070\052\114\073\115\070\050\066\097\116\117\051\115\047\115\118\061\061";"\076\051\090\121\097\076\101\099\115\075\119\078\071\075\050\061";"\086\113\101\117\054\072\080\097";"\072\113\082\043\068\051\089\061","\115\075\090\084\115\122\051\078\097\076\089\061","\116\119\070\110\116\056\099\066\097\122\047\073\101\054\073\101";"\071\122\119\048\085\118\061\061","\097\100\119\121\097\1 X=h(c)local Q=function(Q,B,J,z)return T(x,{Q,B,J;z},c,X)end return Q end,{},function(x)local c,T=(-34219-434711)-(-468931),x[234604-234603]while T do D[T],c=D[T]-(-28337+28338),(-861756+861757)+c if T(x,{...},c,X)end return Q end,function(x,c)local X=h(c)local Q=function(Q,B)return T(x,{Q,B},c,X)end return Q end,function(T,Q,B,J)local L=nil r=M(u)g[G]=r G=nil T=939621-20801 end end end end end end end T=#J return X(b)end,function(x,c)local X=h(c)local Q=function(Q)return T(x,{Q},c,X)end return Q end,function()q=(-811620-(-811621))+q D[q]=118494+-118493 return q end,function(x,c)local X=h(c)local Q=function()return T(x,{},c,X)end return Q end return(i((-585113+17881261)-641977,{}))(X(b))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[c(-932620-(-1491397-(-611176)))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
